hotel_name: Areal House Tam Đảo (Areal House Tam Đảo )

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: The price is high compared to the average, the location is normal, not beautiful, and not as clean as expected.

reviews.title: A suitable place for price per performance
reviews.text: The room is clean, the facilities is enough. It has car park. Especially, motorbike rent amount is reduced when I give motorbike back earlier

reviews.title: Delicious food, the host is very friendly.
reviews.text: The accommodation is very close to the center (Tam Dao Square), just over a 10-minute walk, and close to the Ba Chua Thuong Ngan Temple (2 minutes walking). The room is small and cozy, suitable for families or couples. The hosts are very lovely and attentive. I went on March 8th and even received flowers. The homestay has a yard for BBQ and outdoor grilling, which is very enjoyable and suitable for the chilly weather. The food is very delicious and ample, and the prices are very reasonable.
reviews.room_type: Family Room - 1 Single Bed and 1 Queen Bed

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Both the house and the room are beautiful, and the host is extremely enthusiastic and friendly. I will visit again many times hehe.

reviews.title: A nice brief stay!
reviews.text:
We planned this trip with a group of three, and I mistakenly booked the trip for the wrong date—but the Agoda support and the host were super helpful in helping us move the date of booking.

We arrived and checked in without a hitch and the host was super friendly and pleasant. Shout out to miss Viet Anh for her hospitality!

The only thing I'd have a small complaint about is the fact that the bathtub couldn't be used due to lack of hot water for a bath (which is understandable due to it being a higher region). The room was cozy and nice and our group had a good rest and a nice time throwing a small snack party there. All basic amenities provided for and the bed was comfy, which was all we really needed for a nice stay.

The location is nearly at the the tippy top of Tam Dao, which was actually pretty easy to get to on a motorcycle, we simply used Google Maps and searched up the place to take us there. Since it's high up it can get a bit cold at night, but the view is breathtaking both at night and in the early morning. It's not some super fancy pool-side mountain-side location but you can get a pretty wide angle down the hill below and up at the mountains nearby. You even get a nice courtyard just outside the rooms on the second floor, which you can just sit to chill and smoke, or if you feel like it, set up a nice grill there; but it's nice enough to just sit there and take in the view or take some photos.

We only booked the place for one night and checked out early the next morning (since we were going to the mountain streams after that) but it was overall a very nice, very pleasant stay.

I almost forgot to mention but just downstairs there's a very convenient general store as well as an iced tea shop for some cheap refreshing drinks, snacks and some quick chatting. The property manager also owns a cute small pet dog (who may or may not greet you during check-in) and you can ask them for permission before petting the good boy.

I didn't expect much besides having a place to stay during our mountain trip, but the stay was actually a lot more pleasant than I thought it would be. I guess it's the little things and the local people (along with the host) being super friendly and supportive, and something about the cool nice refreshing air, and not just the cozy room, that all helped to make us feel right at home.

If you're not fussy about the finer details of a fancy hotel and just want a nice, cozy place for a short stay, whether for going on a trip by yourself or with friends, Areal House might just be the perfect place for you.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The host is very enthusiastic and lovely, the homestay offers a meal for 300k/person, which includes dinner and breakfast, and it's pretty good.
reviews.room_type: Family Room - 1 Single Bed and 1 Queen Bed

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Vị trí có lẽ ko quá xa trung tâm, đi bộ xuống quảng trường mất mấy phút thôi. Không có view núi rừng, săn mây nhưng vẫn có view hoàng hôn cực đỉnh. Homestay có chú cún xinh và quấn người. Đồ ăn rất rất ngon và đầy đặn. Phòng thơm, gọn gàng sạch sẽ, có điều hoà ấm. Gia đình chủ nhà rất nhiệt tình và hiếu khách. Cảm ơn vì homestay quá tuyệt

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: A cozy homestay with such a warm and helpful host. She gave us some chocolates as Christmas gifts🥰 Would definitely come back! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
reviews.room_type: Family Room - 1 Single Bed and 1 Queen Bed

reviews.title: Incredible kindness and the best breakfast.
reviews.text: Biet Anh is a very kind and considerate host. The hotel facilities are excellent for the price. What we want to emphasize is not just the clean and elegant facilities. There are acts of deep kindness and consideration that go beyond what a hotel host is expected to do, such as rushing to tell us a shortcut while we were walking up the hill to check in and go sightseeing, or bringing clothes hangers to help dry our laundry that we had hung on the railing. Additionally, they take care of even the smallest details. If we want to experience such genuine and valuable kindness rather than the usual niceties of a high-end hotel, we would choose to stay here again. The breakfast is all delicious. I would also recommend it as a place to stay for a month.

reviews.title: Cozy and valuable accommodation.
reviews.text: The accommodation is clean, with excellent service. The location is convenient for traveling, and all amenities are complete. Very nice! 😊❤️
reviews.room_type: Family Room - 1 Single Bed and 1 Queen Bed

reviews.title: Wonderful
reviews.text: Quiet, clean. The host is enthusiastic, and the marinated food is incredibly delicious compared to the tourist spots I've been to. Definitely worth returning many times.

reviews.title: Wonderful
reviews.text:
Wonderful experience. The room is clean and quiet. Close to the square but not crowded, without the noise of motorbikes from young travelers.  
The food is delicious, I’ve been to Sapa and Tà Xùa but haven’t had any marinade as good as this, very satisfying. The host is friendly and thoughtful. It’s perfect for resting.  
The meal set is ordered directly upon check-in. Overall, I will come back again.

reviews.title: Wonderful home, 10 points.
reviews.text: I rarely write reviews but this home is so great that I have to write… The room is clean and fully equipped, the air conditioning cools down quickly, the pictures look just like in real life, it looks lovely everyone. It's a bit hard to find a room with a beautiful view of the clouds, but for a low-priced room with such quality, it's just amazing. The hosts are very friendly and helpful 😍, supporting guests enthusiastically; from check-in to check-out, they provided great recommendations for places to eat and have fun… In short, there's nothing to complain about! 💯

reviews.title: Super enthusiastic, always clean!
reviews.text: The host is extremely enthusiastic, everything is very clean. The room is super cute, you should confidently book it right away!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The room is clean, quiet, and fully equipped with necessary items. The host is friendly.
